lines.target: On Sunday, David decided he would go and see* his parents who lived in Oxford.
lines.base: El domingo, David decidió que iría a ver a sus padres que vivían en Oxford.

lines.target: They wanted to leave* early to avoid the crowds, so they got up at half past six.
lines.base: Querían salir pronto para evitar las aglomeraciones, así que se levantaron a las seis y media.

lines.target: By seven o'clock, they were ready. They got into the car and set off.
lines.base: A las siete estaban listos. Subieron al coche y se pusieron en camino.

lines.target: Have you got everything? said Joan.
Of course | have. | rang* Dad last night and told* him we would arrive at about ten.
lines.base: Por supuesto que sí. Llamé a papá anoche y le dije que llegaríamos sobre las diez.

gap_candidates.target: They wanted to leave* early to avoid the crowds, so they got up at half past six. (1)
Have you got everything? said Joan.
Of course | have. | rang* Dad last night and told* him we would arrive at about ten. (2)
